ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag or keyword associated with the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_tags_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "class_section" TEXT /* Class or section to which the test case belongs */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the test case */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "testable" TEXT /* Indicates if the test case is testable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test case */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the test case */,
  "estimated_execution_time" INTEGER /* Estimated execution time of the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the test suite covers */,
  "num_test_cases" INTEGER /* Number of test cases in the suite */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case that was executed */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test suite the test case belongs to */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Outcome of the test execution (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes regarding the execution */,
  "execution_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test execution */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case associated with the defect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "defect_type" TEXT /* Type of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the defect */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the defect */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the defect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the defect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Tester, Developer, Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Tester, Developer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test case */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created or updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made on the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_comments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case */,
  "num_passed" INTEGER /* Number of passed tests */,
  "num_failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed tests */,
  "execution_duration" INTEGER /* Total execution duration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_metrics_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_records" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution record */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executed test case */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the test */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Outcome of the execution (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Notes regarding the execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_records_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case that is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the execution is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scheduled execution (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments related to the scheduled execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_schedules_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)
